title: Trigger fresh redeploy for UniPlace Manager preview URL

requirements.summary: Create a no-functional-change frontend touch and update deployment documentation to trigger a fresh build + deploy and obtain a new preview URL.
acceptanceCriteria: A new deployment is triggered for the current UniPlace Manager project.
After deployment completes, a new public preview URL is produced and shared.
Opening the new preview URL in a browser returns the application (no HTTP 400).

file_operations.description: Add a non-functional redeploy marker comment (or similarly inert change) to force the deployment pipeline to rebuild and redeploy without changing application behavior or UI.
Update documentation with concise steps/checklist to request a fresh redeploy and verify the new public preview URL resolves without HTTP 400 (no feature/UI changes).
